note: The eng-lead reads this to pick the next task. priority 1 = do first. Start low-risk to prove the loop.

items.title: Unit tests for the games engine (lib/games.ts)
items.why: 15 betting formats with zero tests — the safest high-value first loop.

items.title: Unit tests for voice schemas + normalization (lib/voice/*)
items.why: Core differentiator; a deterministic harness exists — add focused unit coverage.

items.title: Surface confidence + a confirm prompt on low-confidence voice parses
items.why: The parser returns a confidence score but the UI never shows it or asks to confirm.

items.title: OCR scorecard scanning flow (CameraCapture -> auto-fill scores)
items.why: Promised in the README; CameraCapture component exists but there's no end-to-end flow.

items.title: Stats & trends view (expand RoundSummary)
items.why: Listed as a future enhancement; the underlying round data already exists.

items.title: Migrate backend JSON-file storage to Postgres/Supabase
items.why: JSON files don't scale and risk concurrent corruption. A Supabase schema exists but is unused.

items.title: Tee-time finder — ground the mocked 'Dispatch Looper' to real data
items.why: Polished 3-phase mock UI exists but the data is fabricated. There is no free tee-time API. Phased via a backend provider pattern that keeps the TeeTime contract + UI untouched: Phase 1 MVP needs NO gated API (real course search + GolfNow/course booking deep-links); Phase 2 = live slots via the GolfNow Affiliate & Partner API; Phase 3 = real auto-booking via Lightspeed/foreUP.
items.blocked_on_owner: GolfNow Affiliate & Partner API application (Phase 2+); Lightspeed Partner creds (Phase 3 booking)
